meaning: adj.脑筋不正常的,昏头昏脑的
examples: Ben: Carol's dressing her in some dippy outfit.
He has a dippy notion that the moon is inhabited.
I hear you're dippy over a dame at the New Congress Club.
Ricardo Tisci, at Givenchy, had everyone swooning over his fluid gypsy skirts, chunky sweaters, sweatshirts and hippy-dippy booties.
